import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import api from '../utils/api'; import BrandLogo from '../components/shared/BrandLogo'; const quickPoints = [ 'Choose a charity at signup', 'Track scores and join reward draws', 'Follow winnings and payouts clearly', ]; const simpleSteps = [ { title: 'Choose', text: 'Start by selecting a charity you want to support.', }, { title: 'Play', text: 'Log your scores and become eligible for prize draws.', }, { title: 'Track', text: 'See your charity impact, results, and payout status in one place.', }, ]; export default function LandingPage() { const [featuredCharities, setFeaturedCharities] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { api.get('/charities?featured=true') .then((response) => setFeaturedCharities(response.data.charities || [])) .catch(() => setFeaturedCharities([])); }, []); return (
Sign In Get Started
Charity first

Play with purpose. Support a cause every month.

Golf Charity turns subscriptions, score tracking, and prize draws into a clear charity-first experience.

Start Supporting a Charity View Plans
{quickPoints.map((point) => (
{point}
))}
How it works
{simpleSteps.map((step, index) => (
{index + 1}
{step.title}
{step.text}
))}
{featuredCharities.length > 0 && (
Featured charities

Causes currently highlighted on the platform

{featuredCharities.slice(0, 3).map((charity) => (
{charity.category || 'General'}

{charity.name}

{charity.description}

))}
)}
Clear next step

Subscribe, pick a charity, and begin.

The flow is simple by design. Choose a plan, activate your dashboard, and keep everything visible from impact to winnings.

Subscribe Now Create Account

Golf Charity brand system updated for a cleaner, unified identity.

); }
